action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch. Analysis: Need to establish a baseline and measure iteration time. I will implement a standard ResNet50 model pretrained on ImageNet, fine-tuned with class weights to handle the heavy class imbalance. I will train for 2 epochs to quickly get a baseline score and measure the time taken per epoch. Decision: Write train.py and predict.py, train for 2 epochs, and submit for evaluation.
